info.title: Karls Better Secrets Tool
info.description: An easier way to manage your .NET User Secrets from the command line.

options.name: --id
options.description:
The User Secrets ID to use. If not specified, the ID will
be resolved from the project in the working directory.

options.name: --configuration
options.description:
The build configuration to use when resolving the
project. Defaults to 'Debug'.

arguments.name: WORKING_DIRECTORY
arguments.description:
The working directory containing the .NET project to
manage secrets for. If not specified, the current directory will be used.
